title: Can't delete/set colour of default status?
excerpt: One of the default statuses is grey and I can’t delete it and I can’t change the colour (doesn’t give me the drop icon when I mouse over the colour). Please help! New to Monday so sorry for basic question.

posts.author: Nick2 (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
image384×552 14.8 KB

One of the default statuses is grey and I can’t delete it and I can’t change the colour (doesn’t give me the drop icon when I mouse over the colour). Please help! New to Monday so sorry for basic question.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @Nick2 - Welcome to the community! You cannot delete the default status column or change its color. You can set a new default selection for items using this option: Duplicate of Project Beta —...

But be aware that if you set a default value for items that way, it will override automations for new items.

posts.author: Nick2 (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! What a strange restriction. You must use a boring grey status. Anywho - thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
